This pull request replaces the floating action button (InvoicesFab) with a footer action bar in the table's existing footer. Actions such as "Generate CRR", "Generate Packing Slip", and "Generate Invoice PDF" are now accessible through this footer. The selection state is centralized in `InvoicesSelectionStore` for consistency and easier management. Additionally, unused code related to the stock-line selection was removed for better maintainability. Styled components are used to enhance button styling.*See PR for images.*
